name: ollama-pool-gateway
description: Ollama Pool Gateway - Multi-tenant API key rotation gateway for Ollama Cloud

scripts.install:all: cd backend && npm install --legacy-peer-deps && cd ../frontend && npm install
scripts.build: cd backend && npm run build && cd ../frontend && npm run build
scripts.db:migrate: cd backend && npx prisma migrate dev
scripts.db:seed: cd backend && npx prisma db seed
